name: visual-brainstorming
description: Compare visual alternatives in a local browser and record user choices as structured events.

interface.shortDescription: Compare and select visual alternatives locally.
interface.longDescription: Visual Brainstorming generates offline HTML comparisons for UI, architecture, process, state, data-flow, and model-routing decisions. It opens a loopback-only browser companion by default and records choices and notes as project-local structured events.
defaultPrompt: 用 $visual-brainstorming:visual-brainstorming 把当前视觉决策整理成可点选方案。
